description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a deep seat and straight, angular lines. The sofa is upholstered in a dark gray fabric that appears smooth and uniform, with three distinct seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion. The armrests are straight, flat, and extend at the same height as the backrest, creating a geometric, enclosed seating area. The base and sides of the sofa are solid and fully enclose the lower portion, with no visible legs or underframe. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments. The sofa's surfaces are matte and soft, with no visible decorative elements or patterns.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with dark gray upholstery, straight armrests, and three seat cushions. The design is minimalist, with a solid base and smooth, matte fabric.
description_view_0: Front view shows three seat cushions, a single back cushion, and straight, boxy armrests enclosing the seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the solid, flat armrest and the depth of the seat, with the backrest and cushions visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, unadorned back panel and the top edge of the backrest, with no visible cushions or armrest details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other armrest and the sofa's depth, with the same solid, boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion, all flush with the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat, and boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is a solid, continuous plinth that fully encloses the bottom of the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with a single attached cushion, matching the height of the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
